esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.server.days_until_first_cert_expiring IS NOT NULL
// Days until first TLS cert expires — alert when below threshold
| STATS min_days = MIN(envoy.server.days_until_first_cert_expiring)
// Adjust threshold (7 days) based on your cert renewal lead time
| WHERE min_days < 7
